# SwiftList — Full Documentation for LLMs

> AI-powered product image automation SaaS for e-commerce sellers

## Product Overview

SwiftList automates product image workflows for makers in the creator economy. Users upload product images and SwiftList applies AI treatments: background removal, upscaling, lifestyle scene generation, and batch processing. Output images are automatically sized for 6 major e-commerce marketplaces.

### Target Users
- Etsy sellers (jewelry, vintage clothing, handmade goods)
- Shopify store owners
- Amazon FBA sellers
- Poshmark and eBay resellers
- Small e-commerce businesses needing professional product photography

### Problem Solved
Small sellers spend hours manually editing product photos or pay $5-25 per image for professional editing. SwiftList automates this at a fraction of the cost using AI, delivering marketplace-ready images in seconds instead of hours.

## Features

### CleanEdge Intelligence (Background Removal)
A proprietary 7-agent AI pipeline for background removal:
1. Initial segmentation using Bria RMBG 2.0
2. Edge detection and refinement
3. Jewelry-specific edge processing (handles reflective surfaces, fine chains, gemstones)
4. Shadow generation for natural product placement
5. Quality validation
6. Multi-format export

CleanEdge produces edge-perfect cutouts that preserve fine details like jewelry prongs, fabric textures, and translucent materials.

### Lifestyle Scene Generation
Uses Google Imagen 3 (~$0.004/image) to generate contextual lifestyle backgrounds:
- Product is placed into AI-generated scenes matching the seller's brand aesthetic
- Scenes are guided by "Vibes" — style presets that define the visual treatment
- Examples: rustic wooden table, minimalist white studio, vintage market stall

### Vibes Marketplace
A community marketplace for AI style presets:
- 38+ curated seed presets across categories: Jewelry, Vintage, Fashion, Home, 3D Print
- Users can create and publish their own Vibes
- Sparks Royalty System: creators earn credits when others use their published Vibes
- Vibes define: background style, lighting, mood, color palette, and scene context

### Batch Processing
- Process multiple product images in a single job
- Consistent styling across all images using the same Vibe
- Automatic marketplace-specific sizing

### Multi-Marketplace Export
Automatic image sizing for:
- Etsy (2000x2000px, 1:1 ratio)
- Shopify (2048x2048px)
- Amazon (2000x2000px, white background option)
- eBay (1600x1600px)
- Poshmark (1200x1600px, 3:4 ratio)
- Facebook Marketplace (1200x1200px)

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Credits | Best For |
|------|-------|---------|----------|
| Starter | Free | Limited | Trying the service |
| Pro | $19/month | Regular usage | Active sellers |
| Business | $49/month | High volume | Power sellers |

Credits are used per image processed. Different AI treatments cost different amounts of credits.

## Technical Architecture

- **Frontend**: SvelteKit with Svelte 5 (Runes), TailwindCSS
- **Backend**: SvelteKit server routes, Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage)
- **Job Processing**: BullMQ workers on Railway
- **AI/ML**: Google Imagen 3, Bria RMBG 2.0, Anthropic Claude (image analysis)
- **Deployment**: Railway (app + workers), Cloudflare (CDN/WAF)
- **Payments**: Stripe

## Key URLs

| Page | URL | Description |
|------|-----|-------------|
| App | https://swiftlist.app | Main application |
| Marketing | https://heyswiftlist.com | Marketing landing page |
| Vibes | https://swiftlist.app/presets | Browse style presets |
| Dashboard | https://swiftlist.app/dashboard | User dashboard (authenticated) |
| Analytics | https://swiftlist.app/analytics | Creator analytics (authenticated) |
| FAQ | https://swiftlist.app/faq | Frequently asked questions |
| Terms | https://swiftlist.app/terms | Terms of service |
| Privacy | https://swiftlist.app/privacy | Privacy policy |

## Competitive Positioning

SwiftList is NOT a general photo editor. It is specifically built for e-commerce product photography automation. Key differentiators:
- Purpose-built for marketplace sellers (not photographers or designers)
- AI-first workflow (not manual editing with AI assist)
- Multi-marketplace export in one job
- Community Vibes marketplace with creator royalties
- CleanEdge Intelligence for jewelry-grade edge quality

## Contact
- Support: support@swiftlist.com
